allow: Bash(git commit -m 'fix: remove supabaseId checks, use user existence instead *)

Bash(git commit -m 'add explicit logging for auth and plan creation *)
Bash(git commit -m 'add global exception handler with explicit error detail and logging *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: replace all maybe_single\(\).execute\(\) with sb_single\(\) helper *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: sync active plan to cloud when user changes it *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: offer to redeploy current week when active plan changes *)
Bash(git commit -m 'audit fixes: remaining maybe_single, unsafe data access, dead code *)
